user_message: What is your refund policy?
ground_truth_answer: Our refund policy allows refunds within 30 days of delivery for most products. Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days.

user_message: How long does delivery take?
ground_truth_answer: Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days. Same-day delivery is available in Karachi, Lahore, and Islamabad for orders placed before 12 PM.

user_message: Do you deliver to Gilgit-Baltistan?
ground_truth_answer: Yes, we deliver to Gilgit-Baltistan. Remote areas may take 7-10 business days and COD may not be available.

user_message: Same day delivery available hai?
ground_truth_answer: Haan, Karachi, Lahore, aur Islamabad mein same-day delivery available hai agar order 12 PM se pehle karo.

user_message: What payment methods do you accept?
ground_truth_answer: We accept Easypaisa, JazzCash, bank transfer, and credit/debit cards for payment.

user_message: Can I cancel an order after placing it?
ground_truth_answer: You can cancel orders that are still in Processing status at no charge. After dispatch, you would need to refuse delivery or initiate a return.

user_message: How do I track my order?
ground_truth_answer: You can track your order using the tracking number in your confirmation email on TCS, Leopard, or M&P portals. We also send real-time SMS updates.

user_message: Premium tier mein kya benefits hain?
ground_truth_answer: Premium customers ko 1 business hour ke andar response milta hai, weekends aur holidays par bhi. Priority support aur exclusive discounts bhi included hain.

user_message: What is COD and is it available everywhere?
ground_truth_answer: COD (Cash on Delivery) is available in most areas but not in some remote zones like parts of Gilgit-Baltistan.

user_message: What happens if my delivery is delayed?
ground_truth_answer: If your delivery is delayed beyond the estimated date, please contact our support team. We will investigate with the courier and provide an update within 24 hours.

user_message: Return policy kya hai?
ground_truth_answer: Aap 30 din ke andar product return kar sakte hain. Refund 3-5 business days mein process hota hai.

user_message: Is express delivery available in Lahore?
ground_truth_answer: Yes, express delivery (next business day) is available in Lahore for orders placed before 3 PM PKT.

user_message: How can I contact customer support?
ground_truth_answer: You can reach our support team via WhatsApp, live chat on our website, or by emailing support@resolveai.pk. We are available 24/7.

user_message: What areas in Karachi have same-day delivery?
ground_truth_answer: Same-day delivery in Karachi covers DHA, Gulshan, Clifton, and surrounding areas.

user_message: Can I change my delivery address after placing an order?
ground_truth_answer: You can change your delivery address before the order is dispatched. After dispatch, address changes are not possible. Please contact support immediately if you need to update your address.
